meta.name: Sun
meta.author: petpet-builtin
meta.description: A monkey-king companion born from the magical stone of Huaguo Mountain. Medium difficulty — engaged users reach the final Buddha form in a few months of regular use.

species.name: Sun
species.description: Sun Wukong — the Stone Monkey turned Great Sage turned Victorious Buddha. Grows from stone-spark to enlightenment as you feed it tokens, prompts, and grinding sessions.
